ladder.name: Discovery Proven
ladder.purpose: inventory confidence only; no execution guarantees

ladder.name: Executable Proven
ladder.purpose: execution confidence only; no behavioural guarantees

ladder.name: Foundation Proven
ladder.purpose: USF primitives proven sufficient for production-grade services

staging.purpose: Foundation and production-rehearsal assurance after L3/L4 closure
